theme.description: Name of the current splash theme

VisibleBell.description: Use a visual bell instead of a sound

InvertScreen.description: Invert the system colors on the bell

ShowCopyMoveMenu.description: Show 'Copy To' and 'Move To' commands in context menu

ShowAddToPlaces.description: Show 'Add to Places' in context menu.

ShowOpenInNewTab.description: Show 'Open in New Tab' and 'Open in New Tabs' in context menu.

ShowOpenInNewWindow.description: Show 'Open in New Window' in context menu.

ShowOpenInSplitView.description: Show 'Open In Split View' in context menu.

ShowCopyToOtherSplitView.description: Show 'Copy to other split view' in context menu.

ShowMoveToOtherSplitView.description: Show 'Move to other split view' in context menu.

historyBehavior.description: Option to determine the behavior of KRunner's history and history completion

verticalSplitterSizes.description: Divides file list and editors with commit details

horizontalSplitterSizes.description: Divides commit editor and diff editor

automaticLookAndFeel.description: Switch the look and feel package depending on time of day

defaultLightLookAndFeel.description: Global Look and Feel package, alternate

defaultDarkLookAndFeel.description: Global Look and Feel package, alternate

Zoom.description: Whether the Zoom effect is enabled

Magnifier.description: Whether the Magnifier effect is enabled

keepHistoryFor.description: How many months keep the activity history

whatToRemember.description: Which data to keep in activity history

allowedApplications.description: List of Applications whose activity history to save

blockedApplications.description: List of Applications whose activity history not to save

borderSizeAuto.description: Use theme's default window border size

closeOnDoubleClickOnMenu.description: Close windows by double clicking the window menu button

alwaysShowExcludeFromCapture.description: Always show "Hide from Screencast" button, even if the window is not excluded from screencast already.

Theme.description: Name of the current icon theme

MouseKeys.description: Use keys to control the mouse

RepetitionInterval.description: Repetition interval for the mouse movement

lastUsedCustomAccentColor.description: The last used custom accent color before user switched to wallpaper generated color or default color

accentColorFromWallpaper.description: Whether accent color from wallpaper should be applied

MaximumTextWidthIndex.description: Maximum text width index (0 means unlimited)

rollOverDesktops.description: Whether or not, we circle through the virtual desktop when moving from one to the next

desktopChangeOsdEnabled.description: Display in an OSD the virtual desktop name when switching between virtual desktops

textOnly.description: Whether or not to display desktop layout in the OSD

defaultLightLookAndFeel.description: Global Look and Feel package, alternate

defaultDarkLookAndFeel.description: Global Look and Feel package, alternate

automaticLookAndFeel.description: Switch between dark and light global themes depending on time of day

automaticLookAndFeelOnIdle.description: Switch between dark and light global themes when the computer is idle

automaticLookAndFeelIdleInterval.description: How long the computer should be idle in order to switch between dark and light global themes, in seconds

cursorTheme.description: Name of the current cursor theme

dndBehavior.description: For local files on the same device, whether dragging and dropping will perform a move operation instead of showing the options menu

scrollbarLeftClickNavigatesByPage.description: Left-click in scrollbar track moves scrollbar by one page

SortOrder.description: Order in which to sort files

SortFoldersFirst.description: Show folders first when sorting files and folders

SortHiddenLast.description: Show hidden files and folders last

DynamicViewPassed.description: View mode changed once by dynamic view

Invert.description: Whether the Invert effect is enabled

EditableUrl.description: Should the URL be editable for the user

UrlCompletionMode.description: Text completion mode of the URL Navigator

ShowFullPath.description: Should the full path be shown inside the location bar

ShowFullPathInTitlebar.description: Should the full path be shown in the title bar

OpenExternallyCalledFolderInNewTab.description: Should an externally called folder open in a new tab in an existing Dolphin instance

Version.description: Internal config version of Dolphin, mainly Used to determine whether an updated version of Dolphin is running, so as to migrate config entries that were removed/renamed ...etc

ModifiedStartupSettings.description: Have the startup settings been modified (internal setting not shown in the UI)

SplitView.description: Place two views side by side

FilterBar.description: Should the filter bar be shown

GlobalViewProps.description: Should the view properties be used for all folders

ConfirmClosingMultipleTabs.description: Ask for confirmation when closing windows with multiple tabs.

ConfirmClosingTerminalRunningProgram.description: Ask for confirmation when closing windows with a program that is still running in the Terminal panel.

ShowPasteBarAfterCopying.description: Show a bar for easy pasting after a cut or copy was done using the selection mode bottom bar.

UseTabForSwitchingSplitView.description: Use tab for switching between right and left view

CloseActiveSplitView.description: Close the view in focus when turning off split view

OpenNewTabAfterLastTab.description: New tab will be open after last one

ViewPropsTimestamp.description: Timestamp since when the view properties are valid

AutoExpandFolders.description: Use auto-expanding folders for all view types

ShowZoomSlider.description: Show zoom slider in the statusbar

LockPanels.description: Lock the layout of the panels

SortingChoice.description: Choose Natural, Case Sensitive, or Case Insensitive order of sorting the items

HideXTrashFile.description: Also hide files with application/x-trash mimetype

ConfirmOpenManyFolders.description: Ask for confirmation when opening many folders at once.

ConfirmOpenManyTerminals.description: Ask for confirmation when opening many terminals at once.

ConfirmRenameFileType.description: Ask for confirmation when renaming file changes its type.

showEncryptionWarning.description: Whether to show a warning when creating zip archives with AES encryption.

defaultOpenAction.description: Default action when opening archive entries.

extractToSubfolder.description: Extract to a subfolder if the archive has more than one top-level entry.

splitterSizes.description: How the main window is divided.

showInfoPanel.description: Whether to show the information panel.

limitPreviewFileSize.description: Whether to limit the preview according to file size.

previewFileSizeLimit.description: Preview file size limit in megabytes.

minimumSpace.description: Minimum free space before user starts being notified.

minimumSpacePercentage.description: Minimum percentage free space before user starts being notified.

enableNotification.description: Is the free space notification enabled.

firstRun.description: Is this the first time KDE Partition Manager is being run?

StickyKeysAutoOff.description: Turn sticky keys off when two keys are pressed simultaneously

StickyKeysBeep.description: Beep on a sticky key press

KeyboardNotifyModifiers.description: Notify when a keyboard modifier is pressed

CommandWindow1.default: Activate, pass click and raise on release

delay.description: Display large panel and widget tooltips

osdEnabled.description: Display small popups for status changes

ForeColor.description: The foreground color of the display.

BackColor.description: The background color of the display.

ButtonFont.description: The font to use for the buttons.

DisplayFont.description: The font to use in the display.

HistoryFont.description: The font to use in the history.

Fixed.description: Whether to use fixed decimal places.

CaptionResult.description: Whether to show the result in the window title.

TwosComplement.description: Whether to use Two's Complement for non-decimal numbers.

ShowBitset.description: Whether to show the bit edit widget.

ShowHistory.description: Whether to show the history window.

BinaryGrouping.description: Binary figures will be separated by a whitespace after every Xth digit.

OctalGrouping.description: Octal figures will be separated by a whitespace after every Xth digit.

HexadecimalGrouping.description: Hexadecimal figures will be separated by a whitespace after every Xth digit.

nameConstant$(ConstIndex).description: Name of the user programmable constants.
